gt_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t2.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League'
pred_sql: SELECT Country.name FROM League JOIN Country ON League.country_id = Country.id WHERE League.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League';
question: Which country is the Belgium Jupiler League from?
